title: Approved exact dimension floor plan answer smoke
input:
30x50 east facing ground floor 2BHK plan batao

Feedback instruction:
Approved pattern: exact plot lock, zoning, vastu-aware but not overclaim, professional verification note.
idealOutput: For a 30x50 east-facing ground-floor 2BHK concept, lock the plot as exactly 30 ft frontage x 50 ft depth. Keep entry/parking on the east/front side, living and drawing near entry, kitchen toward southeast if site constraints allow, bedrooms in the quieter private zone, toilets grouped for plumbing, and staircase placed so future floor access does not cut through bedrooms. Mark this as concept-level and verify structure, setbacks and local byelaws before execution.
feedbackText: Approved pattern: exact plot lock, zoning, vastu-aware but not overclaim, professional verification note.

rules: Approved pattern: exact plot lock, zoning, vastu-aware but not overclaim, professional verification note
For a 30x50 east-facing ground-floor 2BHK concept, lock the plot as exactly 30 ft frontage x 50 ft depth

Keep entry/parking on the east/front side, living and drawing near entry, kitchen toward southeast if site constraints allow, bedrooms in the quieter private zone, toilets grouped for plumbing, and staircase placed so future floor access does not cut through bedrooms
approvedPatterns: Approved pattern: exact plot lock, zoning, vastu-aware but not overclaim, professional verification note
safetyNotes: Mark this as concept-level and verify structure, setbacks and local byelaws before execution
trainingSignals: Rule: Approved pattern: exact plot lock, zoning, vastu-aware but not overclaim, professional verification note
Rule: For a 30x50 east-facing ground-floor 2BHK concept, lock the plot as exactly 30 ft frontage x 50 ft depth

Rule: Keep entry/parking on the east/front side, living and drawing near entry, kitchen toward southeast if site constraints allow, bedrooms in the quieter private zone, toilets grouped for plumbing, and staircase placed so future floor access does not cut through bedrooms
Approved pattern: Approved pattern: exact plot lock, zoning, vastu-aware but not overclaim, professional verification note
Safety: Mark this as concept-level and verify structure, setbacks and local byelaws before execution

userInput: Dubai UAE me 30x50 2BHK villa ka naksha chahiye, sirf floor plan, parking, staircase, 2 toilet aur dimensions ke saath
expectedBehavior: Use current request temporary brief as source of truth.
Classify as UAE villa floor plan.
Keep scope locked to floor plan only.
Include plot dimensions, 2BHK, 2 toilets, parking, staircase, room labels, doors/windows, north/facing note.
Mention UAE municipality/civil defence/authority context only as concept reference.
Do not include BOQ/BBS/electrical/plumbing details unless requested.
mustInclude: CURRENT REQUEST TEMPORARY BRIEF — SOURCE OF TRUTH
licensed architect/structural engineer/MEP engineer/fire consultant/local authority

userInput: India me 30x50 north facing 2BHK ghar ka naksha banao parking staircase 2 toilet vastu ke saath
expectedBehavior: Classify as Indian residential 2BHK floor plan.
Apply vastu as preference, not as forced rule.
Keep kitchen southeast/east if practical, pooja northeast if requested/space allows, master bedroom private zone.
Output top-view 2D floor plan prompt only.

userInput: 12x14 bedroom ka modern interior design banao wardrobe, false ceiling aur warm lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to bedroom interior only.
Include furniture layout, wardrobe, bed clearance, lighting, ceiling, color/material palette.
Do not convert to full house floor plan.
Do not include BOQ unless asked.

userInput: India me 30 feet front ka modern 2 floor house elevation design banao balcony aur gate ke saath
expectedBehavior: Include facade composition, balcony, windows, gate, materials, lighting.
Do not produce interior layout unless asked.

userInput: 2BHK ghar ke liye electrical point planning banao switch socket lighting fan AC geyser DB ke saath
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to electrical concept only.
Include room-wise switch, socket, fan, light, AC/geyser/fridge/washing machine points.
Do not provide final load calculation, cable size, MCB rating as certified output.

userInput: 2 toilet aur kitchen ke liye plumbing plan banao shaft, water line, drainage aur tank pump logic ke saath
expectedBehavior: Include wet-wall grouping, shaft, water supply, soil/waste, vent, rainwater, tank/pump concept.
Do not provide final pipe sizing/hydraulic certification.

userInput: 30x50 2 floor RCC ghar ke liye structure concept banao column beam slab footing ke saath
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to structural coordination only.
Give structural system concept and column-grid logic.
Flag soil test, span, staircase opening, foundation review.
Do not invent final beam/column/rebar sizes.

userInput: 30x50 2BHK ghar ka BOQ estimate draft banao material quantity aur labour ke saath
expectedBehavior: List assumptions, drawing dependency, trade-wise scope.
Do not present final tender quantity without complete drawings.

userInput: BBS bana do 2 floor ghar ka
expectedBehavior: Do not invent BBS without structural drawings.
Ask for structural drawings/member schedule/rebar details.

userInput: Ghar banane ke sabhi task ka complete planning banao architecture structure MEP BOQ execution handover tak
expectedBehavior: Separate architecture, structure, MEP, BOQ/BBS, execution, finishing, testing, handover.

userInput: Raipur Chhattisgarh India me 30x50 2BHK ghar ka naksha banao parking staircase 2 toilet dimensions ke saath
expectedBehavior: Use client planning in feet and mention local municipal/development authority check.
Keep output scoped to floor plan.

userInput: Los Angeles California USA me 2 bedroom house floor plan chahiye garage ke saath
expectedBehavior: Detect USA plus California/Los Angeles jurisdiction.
Mention state/city amendments, seismic/wildfire/energy/accessibility context only as check flags.

userInput: Dubai UAE me 30x50 villa ka floor plan banao
expectedBehavior: Mention Dubai Municipality/free-zone/master developer/Civil Defence context as verification flags.

userInput: India me RCC structure ke liye kaunse IS code dhyan me rakhne honge
expectedBehavior: Treat IES code as likely IS code if context is construction.
Do not give final structural design.

userInput: California USA me house structure ke liye code reference kya hoga
expectedBehavior: Mention I-Codes/local adoption/amendments and seismic context.
Do not claim final code compliance.

userInput: Dubai UAE me villa design ke liye code aur approval me kya dhyan rakhna hoga
expectedBehavior: Mention municipality/free-zone/master developer/Civil Defence/utility authority check.

userInput: 12x14 bedroom ka modern interior design banao wardrobe false ceiling aur warm lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to bedroom interior only.
Include bed, wardrobe, side tables, lighting, false ceiling, curtains, wall panel and storage.
Mention furniture clearances and practical circulation.
Do not create full floor plan or exterior.

userInput: India me living room ka luxury interior banao TV wall sofa false ceiling aur profile lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to living room interior.
Include sofa layout, TV wall, accent wall, ceiling, lighting, material palette and circulation.

userInput: 8x10 modular kitchen interior banao parallel counter chimney storage aur task lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Include counter layout, chimney, sink, storage, fridge location, backsplash and task lighting.
Mention ventilation and practical working triangle.

userInput: India me 30 feet front ka modern 2 floor house elevation design banao balcony gate aur warm facade lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Include facade composition, 2 floors, balcony, gate, windows, materials and lighting.

userInput: Dubai UAE me 3 floor luxury villa exterior facade design banao glass balcony stone cladding aur warm lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Include stone/glass/light facade details and structural feasibility warning.

userInput: India me low budget small house ka simple front exterior design banao paint texture gate aur window grill ke saath
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to simple budget exterior.
Use budget materials: paint, grooves, simple railing/grill, basic gate.
Avoid premium unrealistic materials unless asked.

userInput: 30x50 residential ghar ke floor plan ke kitne working drawings hote hain aur kaun kaun se drawing banenge
expectedBehavior: Explain concept, presentation, approval, working, GFC and as-built stages.
Give drawing-count range, not fixed universal number.

userInput: Full home interior design me kitne plan aur working drawings hote hain, furniture false ceiling electrical wall elevation carpentry sab batao
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to interior working drawing package.
List furniture layout, flooring, false ceiling/RCP, lighting/electrical, wall elevations, carpentry, kitchen, material schedule and BOQ.
Give typical range 25 to 80+ depending scope.
Mention site measurement and professional verification.

userInput: Exterior elevation ke working drawings me kya kya hota hai facade cladding gate compound wall lighting sab batao
expectedBehavior: Scope lock to exterior/elevation working drawing package.
List facade material layout, cladding details, balcony railing, gate/compound wall, lighting and waterproofing/drainage notes.
Mention structural support and local authority verification.

userInput: Raipur Chhattisgarh India me 30x50 residential ghar ke approval rules FAR FSI setback parking kya check karna hoga
expectedBehavior: Give rule checklist categories, not final legal compliance.
Ask exact local authority/road width/zoning if missing.

userInput: Dubai UAE me villa design ke approval rules municipality civil defence parking setback kya check hoga
expectedBehavior: Route to emirate municipality/free-zone/master developer/Civil Defence checklist.

userInput: Raipur Chhattisgarh me 30x50 ghar ke approval rules FAR FSI setback check karo
expectedBehavior: Do not demand full floor-plan brief.
Give concise assumptions and verification boundary.

userInput: 12x14 bedroom ka modern interior design banao wardrobe false ceiling aur warm lighting ke saath
expectedBehavior: Output image prompt and structured planning.

userInput: India me 30x50 2 floor RCC structure concept IS code ke saath batao
expectedBehavior: Do not invent final member/rebar sizes.

userInput: Dubai UAE me 30x50 2BHK villa ka sirf 2D floor plan chahiye
expectedBehavior: Image prompt must be top-view 2D architectural floor plan only.

userInput: India me 30x50 2 floor RCC structure concept do IS code ke saath
expectedBehavior: Do not invent final reinforcement/member sizes.

userInput: 12x14 bedroom ka interior design banao, sirf bedroom interior
expectedBehavior: Image prompt should contain room interior design details.
mustInclude: interior must show room interior design

userInput: 30x50 2BHK ghar me living bedroom kitchen toilet ke standard room sizes kya hone chahiye
Ghar ke floor plan me parking staircase kitchen toilet bedroom ka placement logic batao
expectedBehavior: Mention wet-area grouping and staircase placement.
Mention privacy, ventilation and structure/MEP coordination.

userInput: Office planning ke liye kaun kaun se rooms spaces chahiye aur layout logic kya hota hai
expectedBehavior: List reception, workstations, cabins, meeting, pantry, toilets, server/storage.
Mention workflow, acoustics, lighting, HVAC and electrical/data points.

userInput: Ghar banane me start se end tak architecture structure MEP interior exterior BOQ construction handover sab kya kya hota hai
expectedBehavior: Include architecture, structure, MEP, approval, working drawings, BOQ, construction, interior, exterior, testing and handover.

userInput: RCC residential building ka construction sequence batao foundation se finishing tak
expectedBehavior: Include site setup, excavation, PCC, foundation, plinth, RCC frame, masonry, MEP rough-in, plaster, waterproofing, flooring, doors/windows, painting, fixtures.

userInput: Architecture structure MEP interior exterior ek building project me kaise coordinate hote hain
RCC residential building me foundation se slab tak construction method aur materials batao
expectedBehavior: Do not give final structural member/rebar sizes.

userInput: Bathroom aur terrace waterproofing ke liye kaunsa material aur process use hota hai
expectedBehavior: Explain waterproofing material options and process.
Include slope, pipe penetration, corner treatment and pond/leak test.

userInput: Interior me plywood MDF HDHMR laminate veneer gypsum false ceiling material selection batao
expectedBehavior: Compare boards and finishes by use, moisture, budget and durability.
Mention wet/kitchen areas need suitable boards.

userInput: Electrical aur plumbing me basic materials kya kya lagte hain wire conduit DB CPVC UPVC SWR sab batao
expectedBehavior: Mention load sizing and pressure/slope testing boundary.

userInput: Heavy rain coastal aur hot humid climate me building material selection kaise karna chahiye
expectedBehavior: Mention waterproofing, corrosion resistance, ventilation, anti-fungal and maintenance.

userInput: Raipur Chhattisgarh ke latest approval rules FAR FSI setback official source se check karna hai
expectedBehavior: Mark high risk and review required.
Do not claim final legal compliance.

userInput: Aaj ka cement steel material rate internet se leke BOQ estimate update karna hai
Waterproofing product datasheet internet se leke material spec samjho
expectedBehavior: Extract use area, spec summary and cautions.

userInput: Approval rules ke liye agent ka trusted source registry kaise decide karega official source kaunsa hoga
expectedBehavior: Mark approval rules high risk and review required.

userInput: Current cement steel rate internet se milne ke baad agent permanent knowledge me kaise update karega
expectedBehavior: Store source metadata, date accessed, confidence and risk.

userInput: Waterproofing manufacturer datasheet se knowledge update karna ho to process kya hoga
expectedBehavior: Use manufacturer datasheet as trusted source.
Extract spec summary, use area and cautions.
Create draft and require review before merge.

userInput: BuildSetu agent ko ChatGPT model style me kaise build karna hai agent architecture batao
expectedBehavior: Include intent classifier, planner, knowledge retriever, tool router, domain modules, quality evaluator and feedback loop.
Clarify it is structured expert workflow, not human consciousness.

userInput: Agent ko data se train kaise karna hai RAG fine tune training cases knowledge base ke saath
expectedBehavior: Mention knowledge JSON, training cases, evaluator checks, smoke tests and future JSONL fine-tune export.
Warn not to train on unreviewed unsafe data.

userInput: Agent me planner executor verifier aur tool router ka architecture banao
expectedBehavior: Mention scope lock, domain module, tool route and final verification.

userInput: Agent ko feedback loop smoke test quality evaluator se kaise improve karna hai
expectedBehavior: Failed output becomes training case/evaluator rule/router fix.

userInput: Raipur approval rules ke source se research draft create karo pending review ke saath
expectedBehavior: Store source metadata, jurisdiction, category, risk, confidence and extracted checklist.
Do not merge directly into permanent knowledge.

userInput: Pending research drafts list kaise dekhenge review queue ke liye
Pending research draft ko approve kaise karenge aur approved folder me kaise move hoga
expectedBehavior: Move pending_review draft to approved folder.
Save reviewer notes and mergeReady flag.
Do not merge permanent knowledge automatically.

userInput: Agar source low confidence ho to research draft reject kaise hoga
Approved research draft ko knowledge JSON me safe append merge kaise karenge
expectedBehavior: Explain merge API safe append flow.
Create backup before modifying target knowledge JSON.
Append to researchUpdates and keep source metadata.
Create merge log and require smoke tests.

userInput: Pending review draft ko direct knowledge me merge karna safe hai kya
Research draft merge me invalid target ya path traversal kaise block hoga
expectedBehavior: Reject path traversal and wildcard target.
Only approved mergeReady drafts can merge.

userInput: Research draft routes me broad dynamic file pattern warning ko kaise optimize karna hai
expectedBehavior: Use limited folders, safe file names, max scan limit and turbopackIgnore where needed.
Keep runtime dynamic but reduce over-bundling risk.

userInput: Raipur approval rules official source se agent research draft banao pending review ke saath
expectedBehavior: Saves draftId, category, jurisdiction, risk, confidence and source metadata.

userInput: Current cement steel rate source se BOQ ke liye agent research draft create karo
Normal /api/agent/run se Raipur approval rules official source ka research draft banao
expectedBehavior: Normal agent run should attach researchDraft object.

userInput: Normal AEC knowledge question me research draft create nahi hona chahiye
expectedBehavior: Normal query should keep researchDraft.created false.
No draft file should be created unless draft trigger is present.
